company_description:
Inform, educate, entertain... and irritate.

Manchester Confidential. Liverpool Confidential. 
Leeds Confidential. Confidential Guides.

We are Confidentials.com. The North West's most trusted food and drink publisher. 

We're the one with writers who have the freedom to tell it as they see it, regardless of the fallout. 

The one which gives opinions people don't always like, but always respect.

And we're the one people go to when they're deciding where to eat tonight, because they know we know where's good – and we give them the truth not the press release. 

In a crowded online world, we think there is no point in being here if people can't trust us to deliver informed, honest content.   

It's how we got into the top 1% of websites in the UK, and brought in over 700,000 readers in the last quarter.

And it's why when we tell these people about your business, they listen to what we say.  

To our advertisers, we're a way of building up business through innovative content marketing. Using words, pictures, videos, direct mail, social media, and events, we promote their services and products to a geographically targeted audience of ABC1s within the North West & West Yorkshire postcodes.

To our readers, we're a way of finding out what's happening in their city and getting great deals on stuff like eating out and social events. Our websites and emails give them breaking news, exclusive competitions, and articles that keep them entertained and in-the-know. 

To our own people, we're a great place to work that offers lots of benefits, including the opportunity to work at the forefront of digital marketing.

company_description:
Zelens represents a new generation of skincare developed using breakthrough scientific research in the biological functions of the skin.

Our innovation is driven by founder Dr. Marko Lens'​ 20 years of research in skin ageing, his clinical experience as a plastic and reconstructive surgeon and his deep knowledge of formulation chemistry combining active biotechnology ingredients with pure molecules derived from botanicals.

Combining biotechnology and botanicals is not enough. Zelens products combine powerful high-performance active biotechnology ingredients with the unique blend of plant-derived molecules with potent anti-ageing and healing properties.

But simply combining ingredients derived from both sources does not create truly effective skin care. Ingredients must be carefully selected, science-backed and integrated in a formula to work in synergy. Only the exact balance and synergistic action of all ingredients can effectively trigger cellular processes necessary for skin regeneration and repair.

The sophisticated technology of our formulations including multiple ingredients that work in balance and synergy is essential to the remarkable effectiveness of Zelens products.

The leading edge in skin care. Always. Zelens'​ consistent skincare innovation is the result of Dr. Lens'​ continuous research, development and testing. Every Zelens product represents the most advanced, most effective skincare technology available anywhere.

Other good things to know:
Zelens products are extensively tested for safety and efficacy by renowned independent laboratories. Zelens uses no animal testing and no animal-derived ingredients. Zelens uses no parabens. Zelens is committed to eco-responsibility.

company_description:
The JDR Group are an Inbound Marketing Agency, based in Derby in the UK. The company was founded in 2004, employs a team of 30+ multi-skilled digital marketing professionals in-house, and is a Google Partner and one of very few Hubspot Partners with Elite status in the UK.

The MD is David Roberts, a business coach and consultant with 30 years experience in sales and marketing. Leanne Mordue is Head of Operations, and Will Williamson is Head of Inbound – both have been with the company since it's inception. 

The company began as JDR Business Coaches Ltd offering coaching, consulting and training services to company directors, winning a number of awards in this sector during the first three years. The specialisation in digital marketing began with a new branch of the company in 2007, JDR Websites, providing web design and search marketing services. In 2012 the company had grown to over 800 clients in the UK, and added content creation, social media and display advertising to its services and rebranded as the JDR Group. Shortly afterwards they became Hubspot Partners, Google Partners and began the specialisation into Inbound Marketing.

company_description:
Introducing Dr Green: Revolutionizing the Cannabis Industry with Blockchain and NFT Innovation

At Dr Green, we are at the forefront of a groundbreaking paradigm shift in the global cannabis industry. Combining the cultivation of premium cannabis in Portugal with the power of blockchain technology and Non-Fungible Tokens (NFTs), we have created a revolutionary platform that offers full traceability and transparency, while empowering NFT holders to create cannabis orders for their clients.

As a leading cannabis company, we have strategically chosen Portugal as our cultivation hub due to its favorable climate, fertile soil, and progressive regulations. From seed to harvest, our expert horticulturists employ sustainable cultivation practices, leveraging advanced technologies to ensure the highest standards of potency, purity, and consistency.

However, we don't stop at cultivating exceptional cannabis. We have embraced the transformative power of blockchain technology to bring an unprecedented level of transparency and trust to the industry. By leveraging distributed ledger technology, every step of our cultivation process is meticulously recorded on the blockchain, ensuring immutable and verifiable traceability.

But what truly sets us apart is our innovative integration of NFTs into the cannabis supply chain. Each batch of cannabis we harvest is assigned a unique NFT, which becomes an irrefutable digital representation of the physical product. These NFTs, securely stored on the blockchain, encapsulate crucial information about the strain, cultivation process, lab test results, and more.

The NFTs serve as a gateway to an exclusive ecosystem, where our esteemed NFT holders can utilize their digital assets to create cannabis orders for their clients. Through our user-friendly platform, NFT holders can create profitability from their holding by becoming a global cannabis supplier.

Welcome to Crimson Social, we help Estate Agents harness the power of social media for strategic growth. We understand that in today's digital world, a well-executed social media presence is a vital component of your success.

What We Do: At Crimson Social, we specialise in enabling Estate Agents to use social media as a strategic tool for lead generation. We're not just about posting content; we're about creating and curating content with a purpose – a purpose to drive results. Our primary goal is to help you connect with your target audience and transform them into leads.

Our Approach is built on the foundation of organic growth. We firmly believe in the value of authenticity and meaningful engagement. We know that a loyal, engaged community can be your most significant asset. Through our expertise, we will expand your digital community, ultimately converting them into valuable clients.

Why Choose Crimson Social: With over 5 years experience in the real estate industry, from sales negotiating, compliance, accounting to social media marketing, we specialise in serving the unique needs of Estate Agents. We understand your industry, your clients, and the nuances of your market.

Content Strategies: We employ a diverse range of content strategies tailored to your specific goals. Whether it's property showcases, informative articles, or interactive social campaigns, we've got you covered.

Results-Driven: Our commitment is to deliver measurable results. We're not satisfied until you see a clear, positive impact on your business growth.

London-Based: As a London-based agency, we have our finger on the pulse of the local market. We understand the dynamics of this vibrant city and leverage this insight to your advantage.

So why not reach out to us, and let's explore how Crimson Social can tailor a social media strategy that aligns with your business objectives.

company_description:
Serena Bute first made a name for herself back in the 80s when she started making beautiful, comme-des-garçons-esque shirts under her first label, Wendell and Howes. In the late 80's she married and moved to Jamaica, where she spent the next 10 years. There was very little to buy in terms of kids clothes and so she started her own children's wear label. At first she just made clothes for her own kids but they quickly became popular amongst the locals.
 
Serena moved back to London in the mid 90's with her 2 children and from the kitchen of her house in Shepherd's Bush, she started ‘Anonymous by Ross + Bute'. She was first inspired by some thermal vests that she came across whilst styling a fashion shoot. The label evolved into a very British, highly feminine, ageless womenswear brand specialising in knitwear. Sold worldwide and copied worldwide.
 
After deciding to shut up shop with Ross and Bute, Serena took a few years out to spend time with her family. However, she continued to make samples inspired by her own personal collection of clothes ranging from Biba to Ozzy Clarke, she made crepe suits which led on to trousers, all specialising in ease and comfort for people with hectic lives and those that are always on the move.
 
Finally, in 2015, Serena established her self-titled brand - The capsule collection of wideleg joggers with striking grosgrain detailing offers the perfect building blocks for a sportsluxe wardrobe. Appropriate for women of all ages, the trousers represent Serena's personal ethos: stylish, comfortable, easy to wear and suitable through day to night.

company_description:
DeMellier is a fast-growing award-winning contemporary handbag brand based in London. It was named a 2016 Brand of Tomorrow and won the 2018 Emerging Talent Award by Luxury British Association WALPOLE, recognising its commitment to innovation, craftsmanship and the highest standards of quality. DeMellier handbags have become a favourite among strong women all over the world, including celebrities such as Beyoncé, Emily Blunt and January Jones among others. 

DeMellier was founded by Mireia Llusia-Lindh. Mireia was born in Barcelona and after having lived in a number of different cities she settled in London, which she now calls home. She attended university in Barcelona and Switzerland and received an MBA from Harvard Business School. She further developed her business skills and passion for fashion working as a strategy advisor to numerous consumer and luxury goods firms such as Burberry and LVMH. Mireia launched DeMellier with the mission to design in a new way, create products that women would treasure but that would also empower them while giving back through the brand's permanent charity initiative.

All DeMellier handbags are handcrafted in the south of Spain by local artisans using the finest Italian and Spanish materials and for every bag purchased DeMellier funds lifesaving vaccines and treatments aimed to save the life of a child in need through their permanent charity initiative 'A Bag, A Life' in collaboration with SOS Children's Villages and local vaccine providers.

company_description:
Clair de Lune continue to design and manufacture quality nursery bedding and nursery accessories after 75 years of business. 

Here's how it began: Harry Clarence Rodgers, grandfather of current MD John Rodgers originally formed the company back in 1943 as a source of employment for his son Dawson who was returning from active duty during the Second World War whilst stationed in Cairo. To differentiate between the family name and that of his son Dawson, the company was registered using the combination of the family surname and son Dawson's christian name, and so Dawson Rodgers Ltd was formed.

Dawson's son John, now the current MD joined the business in 1964 as the 3rd generation and has continued the family tradition of producing quality products to the highest standards of workmanship.
In 1986 having produced ‘own brand' to so many of its customers, John Rodgers decided that the launch of its own corporate brand was long overdue and so ‘Clair de Lune' was born. The company continues to manufacture a number of products mostly aligned to the nursery trade, at their south Manchester factory where they employ a highly skilled workforce of around 45 personnel including John's son Guy, the 4th generation.

With a team of talented, dedicated British designers, Clair de Lune produce beautiful bedding collections, sheets and blankets and a range of pushchair and car seat accessories designed for the modern parents of today.

company_description:
Emily English has taken the world of social media by storm with her recipes to her audience of over 1.2 million, with her debut and highly anticipated cookbook, ‘So Good', becoming a Sunday Times Best Seller.

However, during all these achievements, Emily observed an evident rise in people experiencing digestive discomfort, dysregulation, food sensitivities, gut-associated mood disorders and even metabolic issues. Because our gut is so interconnected with our body, it became clear to Emily that this area of our health needed attention. And hence Epetōme was created, with a mission: to bring clarity to the complex world of gut health.

Here at Epetōme, we're not just creating digestive supplements; we want to help others build sustainable habits and daily routines to support and nourish your microbiome. Just once a day, every day.

Watch out for more as we embark on this exciting journey.

At Jorvik Web Dev, our drive comes from the desire to help people succeed. At our core, we are problem solvers and we use our tools of web design and development, UX research, SEO and hosting services to solve your problems when it comes to your company's website and online journey.

We know how overwhelming and expensive it can be to start a business and for that reason, four times a year, JWD offers "free website month" where we offer our FastTrack Build websites for 5 small businesses for FREE! Why do we do this? Because we genuinely want to help.

We started this company because we don't believe the 9-5 life works for anybody anymore, particularly if you're a single parent or neurodiverse, both of which our founder is and both of which are becoming the norm. This is why small businesses are so very important and a large part of their success depends on their online presence. This is where we come in.

Our prices are available on our website, which is unusual for a web design agency, but we do this so you can decide what is the most affordable and appropriate package for you. You will NEVER be talked into an up-sell. 

We believe in transparency and honesty throughout your time with us. Utilising the most up-to-date software, we use our 18 years worth of professional knowledge to build successful websites for small and local businesses at affordable prices. Payment can be made in a way to suit you and your business needs and all our packages are flexible, which means so are our prices.

We look forward to working with you.
Hannah, Director of Jorvik Web Dev

company_description:
Hi, I'm Emma - and here's a bit more about me. I am a forty something first time mum living in Warwickshire with my daughter and fiance. There's nothing I like more than having a happy, healthy, family life and making the most out of it. This is exactly what Happy Family Hub is about!

This is why I decided to call the blog 'Happy Family Hub'. I set up the blog as a way of expressing my creativity, to share our adventures as a family and also to talk with others as we navigate this crazy yet wonderful world of parenting - whilst still retaining our identity as an adult! Also, I am a freelance Social Media Manager. I am passionate and fascinated about social media.  I completed training with Digital Mums in 2017 and haven't looked back since. See my 'work with me' page if you want to find out what I could do for you. As well as the blog, you can also like and follow Happy Family Hub on Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, Pinterest and Linked In.

In the next year, we're hoping to get married and Little C starts primary school. There are many sunny days ahead as I enjoy life whilst also living with my brain tumour. I look forward to continuing to share the Happy Family Hub love!

keywords: wellness & fitness services, lactoferrin, immune support, sleep aid, stress relief, vitamin b6, vitamin c, zinc, natural supplements, chewable tablets, anti-viral, anti-bacterial, immune modulation, milk protein hydrolysate, lactium, wellness, gut health, health supplements, cortisol reduction, anxiety support, restful sleep, nervous system support, bioactive peptides, natural ingredients, subscription service, cruelty-free, vegetarian-friendly, gmo-free, made in the uk, easy to take, free shipping, immune deficiency, daily wellness, holistic health, functional medicine, nutritionist approved, customer reviews, chemistry of milk, sustainable sourcing, therapeutic benefits, children's health, adult wellness, nutritional therapy, health benefits of milk, relaxation, calming effects, immune boosters, healthcare professionals, health, wellness & fitness
company_description:
When I first tried lactoferrin in 2018 - on the advice of a scientist - I'd been looking for a natural remedy to stop the cycle of colds that skipped home with my two young sons and rampaged through our house.

I'm a sceptical journalist, but two key points about lactoferrin made me curious:

1. It's an anti-viral and anti-bacterial protein that our bodies produce every day to defend ourselves against germs

2. It's one of the extraordinary ingredients found in mother's milk that bolsters a newborn against infection (and, having had two babies myself, I've witnessed that immune-enhancing magic). So, that's how lactoferrin can be sourced: from cow's milk.

We took it at the first sign of a tickle in the throat or a drip in the nose and it worked - we leapfrogged over the cold with little or no further symptoms. Convinced by the results at home and the scientific studies I read, I brought a team together to create Leapfrog IMMUNE: scientists, doctors, experts in the fields of immunomodulation, nutrition, pharmacy, formulation, wellness, and Renée Elliott, the founder of Planet Organic. 

We've added our second product to the range - Leapfrog SNOOZE - which eases anxiety, reduces stress and zaps sleep disturbance. Its hero ingredient, Lactium, is also sourced from milk and works using peptides that calm and relax a baby after a feed. So that you can sleep like a baby again. 

Stephanie

headline: Social Media Manager
company_full_address: 8-9 The Quadrangle, Romsey, SO51 9DL, GB
company_description:
The ASP story started in 1996, when International Hair Cosmetics Ltd. UK, created and launched the premium haircare brand Affinage Salon Professional, which following a re-brand, is now known as ASP Luxury Haircare.

Initially, the company's product range, targeted at haircare professionals and salons, comprised a line of permanent hair colour, but was soon expanded exponentially, to also include the high-end, luxury consumer market. New product ranges included tone-on-tone and fashion colours; permanent waves specialist highlighting systems; bleaching powders; shampoos; conditioners and styling products. All these products were formulated in-house, by a dedicated team based at the ASP Research and Development Laboratory, in Italy.

Over the past 25 years, the company has continually invested in the development of innovative, technology-driven products that are trusted and used worldwide by discerning consumers and hairdressing professionals. In this time, ASP has grown substantially, and its products are now available in over 50 countries. It has headquarters and training facilities based both in the UK and the USA, where ASP is one of the country's fastest growing haircare brands.

From day one, education and innovation have been at the core of the company's brand proposition and this ethos has been constant, including through the re-brand transition from Affinage to ASP. The ASP brand continues to motivate and inspire salon professionals, listens to its customers' requirements and processes feedback through an open dialogue. This close relationship with the trade instils confidence in the brand's luxury haircare product portfolio and helps ensure that ASP products continue to exceed expectations. In addition, ASP has made a commitment to reduce its environmental impact, and is continually researching ways to incorporate sustainability into its products.

People are at the heart of every business. Behind every website, app, product, and service, people are making sure the cogs turn.

company_description:
Kibbo Kift Agency is a specialist PR and Performance marketing agency exclusively promoting climate solutions and social justice.

We work with global art movements, activists, creative start-ups, international climate organisations, future thinkers and climate and social justice initiatives. Our work has included:

- Handling media relations for Greenpeace UK and Everyday Plastic's The Big Plastic Count 2024.
- Making start-up eco-tech gadgets famous such as SURI's electric toothbrush.
- Catapulting the world's 1.5C deadline into global media with the Climate Clock.
- Being responsible for the fossil fuel industry's waning influence in the advertising and PR industry as the agency of record for Clean Creatives.

Our primary services are PR and Performance Marketing across Google and Meta. During our five years of operation, we've achieved global coverage for our clients in publications such as Dazed, Democracy Now!, Dezeen, Fast Company, Financial Times, Futurevvorld, The Guardian, Highsnobiety, Hypebeast, i-D, Wallpaper*, The New York Times, Vogue, Washington Post, WGSN and many, many more. We've helped several clients achieve game-changing ROAS for their ethical products and created sophisticated advertising campaigns to accelerate climate action for non-profits.

company_description:
Charlie Puffin Digital is a digital marketing agency based in Hitchin, Hertfordshire.

We founded Charlie Puffin Digital in August 2020, right in the middle of the coronavirus pandemic. With one aim:

To help SMEs deliver real business results through social media.

Not ‘doing' social media because ‘everyone else is' or because ‘it's the right thing to do', but working with SMEs to identify the results they want, then developing an approach to deliver those results through the power of social media.

For too long SMEs have either ignored, played at social media in-house, or spent a lot of money with agencies who create and share content often with little thought to the business objectives.

Well, we're here to do things a little differently, starting with our beliefs about Social Media;

✨ It can help unlock business growth
💫 It doesn't need to be complicated or overly expensive
💥 The results it delivers can, and should be, measured

So, if you'd like to grow your customer base and business through social media, get in touch.

PC: $1,500
Keyboard/Mouse: $300
Microphone: $200
Headset: $200
Glasses: $15?

What is your health worth?

Gamer Advantage is on a mission to create products that genuinely improve the well-being of any and all gamers. We are committed to the wellness of every gamer in the world and will continue to invest in science that produces meaningful results.  

We believe that it starts with your vision. The eyes are the windows to our general health and can have a significant impact on our day to day well-being. How you treat your eyes directly effects how your brain and body support your gameplay. We attack that with a clinically proven lens technology that helps improve sleep, health, and performance.  

But it doesn't stop there.  Our frames are designed and crafted to be best in class.  First we ask ourselves "Can I wear it under a headset?" and second we ask "Can I wear it out to dinner?".  If they style and construction answer yes to both of those questions, then we have created the best pair of glasses you will ever own.  If its good enough to game in, its good enough for anyone.

company_description: Herdy's ethos is rooted in one simple belief; to spread smiles and happiness. Herdy's dream is to become the most lovable brand personality in the world. Originally created as a gifting/character brand with a modern take on the Lake District inspired by the region's native breed Herdwick sheep, Herdy has grown into an award winning, multi-category retail business and lifestyle brand. There are two retail operations; Herdy® (lovable gift, home, accessory and lifestyle products) and HerdySleep® (health and wellbeing wool and natural fibre bedding). With diligently selected manufacturing partners Herdy designs and produces all of its own products. There are four own stores in the Lake District, over 250 trade accounts throughout the UK, a licensing programme and trade in the US and Asia. There's even a retailer in the Falkland Islands! A highly engaged community of friends and fans follow Herdy® on Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, Youtube, TikTok, and Pinterest. The company has a charity, the HerdyFund, which is managed and administered by the Cumbrian Community Foundation. The fund model is a percentage of profits give-back. It's purpose is to champion and drive awareness for what originally inspired the idea for Herdy; birthplace, the cheeky Herdwick sheep and the centuries old upland fell farming culture.

We invent | our ideas are tuned into the consumer behaviours of tomorrow – belonging, curiosity, attainment, fulfilment, identity, purpose, security, radical transparency & sustainability.

company_description:
Odylique have been making natural skin care and organic beauty products for sensitive skin for over 25 years. We have one of the UK's largest ranges of organic skin care and our hand-made, organic skin care products are free from parabens, phthalates, artificial fragrance, petroleum, mineral oil, glycols, SLS and all other potentially toxic chemicals. 

Based in Suffolk, England, we are a small family team. Since establishing the Odylique (previously known as Essential Care) brand as a trademark and mail order company in 2003, we have been on a mission to make the purest skincare on earth.

The skincare products have a longer history: Margaret began researching the formulations in the 1980s, after rekindling a lifelong passion for natural medicine by studying aromatherapy and herbal medicine. Motivated by the lack of products suitable for her own and her family's very sensitive and eczema-prone skin, she set about creating truly effective formulations, based only on organic herbs, plant oils and natural active ingredients that are compatible with the most sensitive skin.

Our philosophy is simple: All ingredients must have therapeutic value, as well as making the product a joy to use. We use herbs and essential oils in therapeutic concentrations for optimum benefit. Plant oils must be virgin and cold-pressed so that they have their full antioxidant vitamin-content intact, so as to actively nourish the skin and protect it from premature ageing.

company_description:
There's wide fitting and then there's Cosyfeet! Specially designed to fit and flatter swollen feet, our footwear is much wider, deeper and roomier than the wide-fitting footwear you'll find on the high street. All our styles have the same extra roomy width fitting (6E for women and 3H for men) and can be adjusted to fit a range of swelling and foot shapes so there's no need to worry about complicated foot measurements. 

Based in the South West of England, we have over 40 years' experience in fitting swollen feet and legs. Our footwear is made by experienced craftspeople who mix traditional skills with the latest technology. We use premium quality materials along with state-of-the-art foot comfort to give our customers the most comfortable footwear possible. Thanks to innovations such as our ‘Hidden Depth' design, Cosyfeet fits swollen feet with ease but still looks stylish and streamlined. Some styles can also fit bunions, problem toes, bandaging and orthotics. 

We also offers a range of specialist socks and hosiery. Our extra roomy collection is designed to fit swollen feet and legs while our diabetic-friendly socks won't rub or irritate vulnerable feet. 

At Cosyfeet, we're passionate about providing the best products and services possible, which is why thousands of people shop with us and we are recommended by UK healthcare professionals nationwide. We are also recognised by the Healthy Footwear Guide, a collaboration between UK footwear brands and foot health professionals.

company_description:
Harris Creative is the north of England's leading specialist construction marketing agency, an independently-owned company providing a full suite of marketing solutions to clients across the £100bn UK construction sector.
 
The agency offers strategic guidance, project management, design services, web development, SEO and PPC campaigns, public relations and content creation, photography, videography, animation, social media management, and paid social.
 
Founded more than 35 years ago, Harris Creative has been under the shared ownership of joint managing directors, Neil Craven and Kirsty Scott, since 2020. The business has grown organically in subsequent years to include new team members, new services, and new thinking – always keeping a firm eye on the horizon to ensure our clients benefit from the latest marketing opportunities and stay ahead of any challenges.
 
Our culture is built on shared values of trust, integrity, and support, with a welcoming attitude and positive team mentality that always gives our best to our clients and to each other.
 
Talk to us about all aspects of construction marketing, whether you're a products manufacturer, a distributor or merchant, a contractor or consultant, or anything in between!

company_description:
Attracting adventure travellers requires a unique touch. We understand that better than anyone. As the team behind Adventure Bike Rider, Wired for Adventure, The ABR Festival, and Adventure Travel, we've spent over 30 years helping brands connect deeply with audiences seeking meaningful, thrilling experiences.

We know that reaching the right travellers can sometimes feel challenging, whether due to limited resources, a fresh perspective, or simply needing a partner who shares your vision. That's where we come in.

Our experienced team specialises in bringing destinations to life through award-winning content, high-impact marketing campaigns, and world-class events. From transforming communication strategies into memorable journeys to creating campaigns that drive measurable growth, we're here to help you share the magic of your destination with adventure travellers worldwide.

One recent success? A single email that generated over £600k in sales—a testament to the power of engaging, targeted outreach.

Let's talk about what success looks like for your destination and explore how we can support your goals and make them a reality.

For a free consultation, call 01789 450 000 or email enquiries@adventurize.co.uk.

company_description:
Green House Group was founded in 2009. In the years since we have grown with the platforms, technology, trends, and our clients, to delivery an all-round digital support service for artists, music brands and promoters at any level.

We worked with Charli XCX from her first video going live; seen chart success with The Specials, Mø, Simple Minds, Suede, Laura Marling, Frank Carter & The Rattlesnakes, and The Kooks; helped The Libertines reunite to headline a 65,000 capacity sold out crowd in Hyde Park; launched the critically acclaimed Rockaway Beach festival - which we also co-programme; modernised how catalogue artists sell to their fans; seen sold out capacity crowds at Secret Garden Party, End of the Road, 2000trees, ArcTanGent, Liverpool International Music Festival, and Barn on the Farm festivals; and so much more.

We've worked with artists over a broad spectrum of genres and decades, from alternative icons like Gang of Four and Echo & The Bunnymen, to breaking acts Barns Courtney and The Marmozets, to rock behemoths Pixies and The Zombies, and pop legends Shakin' Stevens, Michael Bolton, Simply Red, and The Thompson Twins.

Recently we've been working with the Bloc Party, Music Venue Trust, Key Production, Trojan Records, World Circuit Records, BMG, Universal, Sony, Chrysalis Records, and CMU. 

Our backgrounds range from PR and journalism, to making music, event promotion, and illustration, giving us an unparalleled understanding of the entire entertainment industry and the needs of our clients. 

Members of Green House Group have acted as advisors to PRS, been guest university lecturers, and are regular panelists at conferences such as The Great Escape, Sound & Vision, Wide Days and SXSW. Outside of this we're music makers, DJs, presenters, writers, and promoters. 

We are a versatile team, who are equally at home out in the field (literally) working hands-on with you, as we are at our desks getting the job done.

company_description:
Central 23 has been in business since 2016. From our modest start of a single greeting card sale to Urban Outfitters, we now sell our products to over 5,000 stores around the world!

Our office is based in the heart of Central London, Soho to be exact. We are behind a very welcoming graffiti ridden door. There are so many games you can play in Soho but my favourite is called "what is that smell". 
It will keep you guessing for hours 👃

We spread love not waste! 🌍
Our products are designed to put smiles on faces and we like to keep our planet smiling too! Everything is made locally in the UK and we print on paper and card from well managed forests. You will see the FSC certification on all of our products. We avoid unnecessary plastic packaging, our products are recyclable and we use vegetable inks whenever possible. 

— What is it like to work at Central 23?
Vee P, joined 2020
Central 23 expect you to be good at what you do, and that expectation has pushed me to excel. You will be trusted and your opinion is valued, I've never worked anywhere where I've felt as appreciated as I do at Central 23!

Emily B, joined 2017
Working at central 23 is so much fun. It's a friendly atmosphere and the best part is having pride and a real sense of achievement within my work.

Imagine never having to worry about how you generate new business again. That's what Stratique's Business Propeller system could do for you.

Stratique was formed in 2003 to solve two of the biggest problems business owners and sales directors face. How to win new customers and keep them loyal and ordering more frequently.

Since 2003 we have been testing and refining a systemised approach to help our clients hit their sales and growth targets and we are so confident in our approach that we offer a money-back guarantee.

We work with like-minded business owners, managing directors and sales directors in the B2B, industrial and manufacturing sectors who are looking to secure profitable sales opportunities, but who are finding it increasingly difficult to do so.

Our management team has over 30 years' experience in new business development for the B2B, Industrial, manufacturing and engineering sectors and our outbound team talk to more buyers and decision-makers in the manufacturing and engineering sector than any other agency we know of.

Our digital and copywriting teams deliver inbound enquiries for our manufacturing and engineering sector clients daily and our team has visited more production facilities than any other agency we know of, so we can confidently walk the walk and talk the talk.

The Business Propeller is a new customer acquisition system with a focus on generating the highest possible quality face to face appointments. 

We find the right decision-makers and nurture them on your behalf, as an extension of your internal team and we guarantee to deliver a steady stream of highly qualified sales opportunities and face to face meetings, or your money back.

company_description:
Entrepreneurs join forces to launch next-gen marketing agency for fast-growth companies.

Harrix Group, a new kind of full-service marketing group built for the next generation of clients, communities, frontiers and consumers, launches with prestigious client roster. We are a new-style marketing group Harrix Group, which has been designed to deliver the marketing needs of 21st century brands and fast-growth companies, has launched in the UK with an impressive roster of clients, including Spurs FC, Wembley, NHS, Uber, Deliveroo, UFC Gym UK, PureGym and Via Van.

A next-gen communications ecosystem built for the new generation of clients, communities, frontiers and consumers, Harrix Group has been set up by entrepreneurs James Rix and Fergus Harrington, to offer a full range of marketing services particularly targeting the specific needs of ‘fast growth' companies, whether home-grown or from overseas.

A new kind of company, built to leverage new technologies, new media channels, new working practices and new consumer markets, Harrix Group is agile, adaptive, responsive and forward thinking -- but also grounded and focused on product and brand strategy and return on marketing investment.

"Challenger brands, new entrants and start-ups don't need expensive press, magazine and TV advertising campaigns that take a PhD to calculate the results for – they need cut-through, they need to build audience fast and they need to see quick return on their investment. And that's what Harrix Group is all about," says James Rix, CEO of Harrix Group.
Harrix Group also has its own Start-Up Incubator and is uniquely positioned to advise the next generation of potential UK Unicorns (start-ups which reach a market valuation of $1bn). It has already worked with a number of Unicorns, including Uber, Just Eat and Deliveroo, helping them build distribution networks and consumer audiences in the UK via face-to-face marketing and digital channels.

company_description:
We Are Cold Water!

Since our founding in 2020, LUMI has swiftly positioned itself as a pioneer in cold water therapy for the sports and wellness community.

Created by two passionate fitness enthusiasts, our brand was built on a commitment to health, wellness, and — of course — the power of cold water.

We specialise in cutting-edge cold water solutions like our LUMI Pod™ and Recovery PRO™ ice baths — innovative world firsts that created the portable ice bath segment.

Why Cold Water?

Our ice baths deliver remarkable benefits, including: 

- Improved sleep quality
- Reduced stress and anxiety 
- Faster muscle recovery
- Enhanced circulation

But our passion for wellness doesn't stop at ice baths. LUMI offers a full range of products, from the lightweight miniPRO™ massage gun to a selection of cold water apparel, catering to the diverse needs of fitness and wellness enthusiasts.

At LUMI Therapy, we're dedicated to elevating performance and wellbeing with innovative products and unmatched customer service, constantly pushing the boundaries of wellness and sports recovery.

It's time to embrace the chill.

company_description:
Skipper's began in early 2013 by former fish merchant Steve 
Moore.  Skipper's is situated in Grimsby, known for its rich fishing heritage 
and status as ‘Europe's Food Town'. Steve has a long history with the local fish industry and saw an opportunity to produce high-quality natural dog treats.

Here at Skipper's, we have 80 years of combined experience in the 
fishing industry. Our treats are low-fat natural fish-based treats 
that act as an everyday treat and as a treat to help clean a dog's 
teeth, protect gums, prevent stiff joints, etc.

From experience built over years and years, we have created 
relations with fish merchants that provide us with the best quality 
fish. It is very important to us where we source our fish because we want 
to provide dogs with the best quality treats. A large percentage 
of our fish comes from zone 27 in the Atlantic ocean, and these 
zones are responsibly monitored by the Marine Stewardship 
Council (MSC).

Our main lines of dog treats consist of Cod or Wolf Fish. Our Cod 
and Wolf Fish are sourced in zone 27 in the Atlantic Ocean, and 
our Salmon are sourced from 2 locations; Scotland and zone 67 
in the Pacific Ocean. Sprats are another main fish species in our 
range, sourced from zone 27 III in the Atlantic ocean.

company_description:
ERA is the trade body representing digital services and retailers offering music, video and games. Our members include Spotify, YouTube, Soundcloud, Amazon, Sky, Deezer and Virgin Media, together with physical retailers including HMV, Game, Asda and Morrisons, and hundreds of independent record shops.   

   

ERA's members have been a driving force in using the power of technology to transform the entertainment business and return it to growth, with around 90% of revenues now generated online. At the same time our physical retail members have driven the unexpected revival of vinyl records, now in their 14th consecutive year of growth. 

 

Working closely with sister organisations representing music, video and games companies, ERA is a strong proponent of open markets, open standards and consumer choice.  

 

Our members supply the sales data which powers the Official Charts Company (music and video charts) and GfK Chart-Track (videogames). Together with record companies trade association the BPI, we own the Official Charts Company.   

   

ERA provides the organisational force behind Record Store Day, the annual celebration of independent record stores which has become the most successful new music industry promotion of the past two decades.

This approach became the essence of what Bamboo Nine stands for: Transparent, Educational and Collaborative. 

Who is Bamboo Nine:
Bamboo Nine are a digital marketing agency that specialise in ecommerce sales, lead generation and brand building. We have pledged to create an inclusive and supportive culture in our organisation where everyone can thrive and are passionate about attracting diverse talent.

Paid Media:
We've built a brand name that's synonymous with transparent paid search by offering unrivalled customer service and a fully committed digital marketing experience. With a ‘zero margin' policy, our clients always know where 100% of their ad spend is allocated. 

SEO & Digital PR:  
Ethical SEO is more than just gaining links and creating content, it's about building your business into a brand. We use the best practises of traditional PR and combine them with our knowledge and expertise in SEO to create campaigns that deliver success.

Design & Development:
Our Design and Development team specialise in everything from creating your company's brand and developing bespoke websites to technical SEO and optimisation. By improving the appearance and performance of your website, we can enhance the quality of your leads.

Social Media:
A tailored social media campaign helps you connect with your audience at every stage of the customer journey. By using best-in-class creative design, messaging and targeting techniques, we can help your business remain at the forefront of your audience's mind.

Stefanini Infinit / Infinit Agency - Philosophy

Although it was 12+ years ago, we haven't forgotten our start-up stage and being an independent agency, are very much an entrepreneurial spirited bunch. Our philosophy and methodology stem from this key understanding – we enjoy creating, building and maintaining digitally-focused ecosystems that help brands grow, not just generate short term results.

We try and maintain a balance between CRO and CX which we view as being two sides of the same coin; a balance between data driven optimizations and creative leaps of faith in which we rely on our experience and understanding of the audience.

We believe campaign mechanics are the metaphors of our creative concepts.
And we believe that automation is the key to achieving this pitch perfect stasis.

STRATEGY + CREATIVITY + TECHNOLOGY = RESULTS

This works only if you take responsibility for the whole PROCESS.

company_description:
We're NAAMA; the only full-stack tattoo removal brand in the world and home of the revolutionary LightSense™ laser. 

Forget everything you thought you knew about laser tattoo removal. Painful treatments? Skin-damage? Waiting years to see your finished results? Not at NAAMA. 

Our patented and FDA-approved laser technology pulses 100x faster than mainstream technologies and operates with ultra-low energy for significantly less pain, healthy skin, and reduced downtime between treatments. It's effective, it's impressive, and it's suitable for all skin tones.

company_full_address: Abbey Road, Lindores, Fife KY14 6HH, GB
keywords: distilling, whisky production, whisky tasting, wedding venue, corporate event venue, distillation, distillery, whisky, visitor centre, free parking, shop, tours, distillery tours, private hire venue, accessible, apothecary tours, corporate events, team building days, single malt whisky, scotch whisky, cask ownership, whisky experience, cask strength, limtied edition, aqua vitae, new make spirit, spirits production, whisky heritage, historic distillery, copper pot stills, local barley, whisky maturation, cask varieties, botanical spirit, whisky cocktails, private cask, bespoke whisky, whisky gifts, cask custodian, whisky history, sustainable distilling, distillery events, craft distilling, personalized bottling, whisky enthusiasts, award winning spirits, whisky shop, premium spirits, whisky membership, whisky distillation, tasting notes, whisky flavors, heritage spirits, whisky tourism, unique cask, whisky brands, scottish distilling, floral notes, wood maturation, barrel aging, distilling equipment, botanical infusion, cask personalization, artisan spirits, local distillery, whisky lover, events services
company_description:
The Spiritual Home of Scotch Whisky. Revived after 523 years. 

Lindores Abbey's widely recognised links to the earliest written reference to Scotch Whisky, mean that people have been travelling to this quiet corner of Fife for centuries.  After a 500-year break, these whisky pilgrims are now once again able to see Single Malt distillation happening once again on this historic site. In 2017, spirit started flowing once again from copper stills at Lindores Abbey.

OUR STORY 
Learning as much as we can from the great Scottish distillers around us, past and present, and from others much further afield, we are looking forward to bringing a very modern whisky-making approach to this ancient site. The distillery was created by converting and enlarging the old Abbey farm steading, which was built from original Abbey stone. The glass-fronted stillroom looks directly out over the Abbey grounds.

WHISKY MAKING
The water for our whisky comes from a borehole near the distillery, in order that we can draw from the same supply used in 1494.  The barley is grown on our land, malted and then mashed in a conventional, semi-lauter tun supplied by renowned distillery fabricators, Forsyths of Rothes. Fermentation is happening in traditional wooden washbacks, supplied by Joseph Brown of Dufftown. We have three Forsyths copper pot stills, one large wash still and two smaller spirit stills, which allows greater copper contact in the final distillation, creating a clean and delicate flavour in the spirit.

A LONG-HELD DREAM
The Lindores Abbey Farm was bought by Drew McKenzie Smith's grandfather in 1913.  Like his father before him, Drew now holds the title of ‘Custodian of Lindores'.  Along with his wife, Helen, Drew spent two decades tirelessly researching, planning and campaigning to bring a distillery back to the grounds of Lindores Abbey.

company_description:
Jane Clayton started making curtains at her kitchen table in the late 1970s. Fast-forward 40 years and Jane Clayton & Company is one of the most well-respected names in the world of fabric, wallpaper and made-to-measure furnishings.

Designer collection:
Since 2013, Jane Clayton & Company has been headed up by Jane's son Bertie whose vision is to make interiors brands accessible to everyone. With this in mind, our buyers ensure we have the best, the exclusives and the most popular fabric and wallpaper designs available. The result is a collection of over 100 different brands, from coveted designer names to emerging independents.

With dozens of new collections added each week, there's always something new and unexpected to discover.

Bespoke made-to-measure:
Made-to-measure is and always has been at the very heart of what we do. Our dedicated team of in-house makers can transform fabrics into bespoke cushions, blinds, curtains and headboards, all of which are skillfully finished by hand.

With years of experience, our team create some of the highest quality soft furnishings available online.

Customer service:
Our offering is backed-up by unrivalled support provided by our friendly and approachable Customer Service team. Each team member has specialist knowledge, enabling them to provide expert advice on all aspects of your fabric or wallpaper project and helping us achieve a 4.8/5 rating from nearly 6,000 customer reviews.

company_description:
Happiness starts with a good gut feeling 
After a chance discovery on a Surrey farm, Symprove launched in 2002. Since then, we've helped over 100,000 people with gut issues love life again!  

We've won awards and the backing of doctors and dietitians. We've worked with leading scientists. And we've become the fastest-growing biotech business (Sunday Times Fast Track 100). With a growth rate of 50% each year.   

Our difference is science 
Just one shot of Symprove contains billions of live bacteria. It's different from dairy or powdered bacteria products because it's water-based – and the science is clear. Our bacteria can survive stomach acid, reach your gut alive – and thrive there. 

Large independent trials have proven this. Including one at King's College London where we outperformed seven other leading products.  

Recommended by experts.  
Customers call it life-changing.  
And 94% feel the difference after 3 months.  

A community to count on 
We take a holistic approach to gut health. We've grown a supportive Facebook community (where there's no such thing as TMI). And our expert-led blog content includes mood-boosting recipes and health tips. Plus, taboo-busting personal stories. And amazing facts about the link between diet, exercise, nature and the microbiome.  

What's next?  
As the wellness market grows and the buzz around the microbiome grows, we're growing too. New roles. New goals. Our sights are set higher than ever. But our mission remains the same: to do away with daily discomfort – and give everyone a good gut feeling!

company_description:
Beyond Retail is an award-winning and fast-growing multi-website online retailer. In just 10 years we've grown from an idea to a £50m/yr business. We're on a mission to help create well-designed homes that look great, feel special, and have a positive impact on people's everyday lives.

We believe the world should be filled with beautiful, functional homes that create a better everyday life for the people that live in them. We think that home is more than just a place - it's also an idea, a feeling, and it's universally important.

Right now, we're focused on transforming bathrooms, improving kitchens, and making sure homes are warm and cosy. In future, we'll look at how we can transform other areas of the home too.

We've always felt very strongly that the best companies are those that care about their people. Happy people do great things. Culture plays a big part in everything we do. We believe work should be fun, and that managers should be multipliers. We value curiosity and life-long learning. We think it's better to know, even when it's easier not to - feedback is essential. We think failure is both natural and necessary. We care about teamwork and collaboration, and we appreciate those with a growth mindset rather than a big ego. Our focus on culture isn't an afterthought - we've cared deeply about it from day one, and our 10 Principles are deeply embedded in how we work, how we act and how we lead.

We're location-agnostic. We have great offices in Bournemouth, and fantastic people from all around the country. Some of us are 100% remote, some work in the office, and others like a mix. It's what we do that counts, not where we do it.

Over 8 million people visit our 3 retail sites (Drench, Tap Warehouse and Only Radiators) each year. In 2011, we shipped our very first order. 10 years later we shipped over 250,000 of them. But to be honest with you, we're just getting started.

Classic Fine Foods UK, has been proudly servicing customers for over 17 years. We are part of the Classic Fine Foods Group, a subsidiary of Metro Group. 

We are the only food service specialist operating internationally with a team of 1,150 employees and 25 local offices in Europe, the Middle East and Asia. 

Classic Fine Foods UK specialises in sourcing the finest ingredients, for cuisine and pastry, and delivering them directly to chefs nationaLly. Our broad portfolio of over 8,800 products ranges from gastronomic jewels to rare and seasonal offerings. 

Located in London and with branches in Manchester, Birmingham, Bristol and Exeter, we are strategically placed to service customers all over England, Scotland and Wales. 

Our Mission is to inspire, empower and support chefs in realizing their culinary ambitions! We supply a variety of customers, whether it's a fine dining restaurant, 5-star or boutique hotel, speciality diner, gourmet food outlet, or a prestigious department store, we can source what's needed. Through close partnerships with over 170 brands and suppliers, we can source for whatever the chefs' type of cuisine and cooking style. More than 8,800 customers put their faith in our company when it comes to haute cuisine. 

We pride ourselves on delivering personalised service and support to meet the unique needs of our customers. With a focus on sustainability, traceability, and expertise, our commitment extends to fostering long-term relationships that enable chefs to create menus and recipes that excite even the most demanding of tastes. 

We are proudly Certified B Corp™ , reflecting our dedication to making a positive impact on our community and environment.

Classic Fine Foods is built around one simple philosophy…  "We select the best from the world and bring it to you!"

company_description:
Founded in 1982 by three brothers in a basement flat in Brighton, King & McGaw exists to celebrate art. In the beginning, we produced prints on a second-hand screen press. Today, we've moved along the Sussex coast and our state-of-the-art workshops have expanded to meet global demand. 
With forty years of printing and framing experience under our belts, world-leading institutions – such as the V&A, Tate, MOMA and The National Gallery – endorse our products, and we're proud guardians of prestigious licenses to produce iconic artworks. 

Our process is meticulous. From the precise pigments we select to the sustainable paper we print on, the frames we make – by hand ​​– to the care that goes into our packaging; everything we produce is uncompromising on quality.

United by a shared passion for fine art, we're making it our mission to preserve it for posterity. That's why we conserve rare pieces and support emerging artists. When you shop with us, artists, their estates, and institutions benefit from sales.

company_description:
The designers and creators of Kulani Kinis are Dani & Alex - two beach loving, wanderlust spirits from the East Coast of Sydney, Australia. They share a love of colour, Hawaii and taking charge of their own destiny. 

Having trouble finding affordable luxury that wouldn't break the bank, this pair wanted to start a movement. The result is the creation of an affordable, 'queen bee' quality line they can share with girls across the world. Why should price trump style or vice versa? With Kulani Kinis, every girl can have both! Since launching in February 2015, Kulani Kinis has captured the hearts of thousands of sunkissed & salty girls all across the globe and they have the photos to prove it. 

We offer superior quality and affordable swimwear; every set of Kulani Kinis can be purchased for under $100 and every piece is unique to our label. The consistent feedback we get from our girls is that our swimwear is the most comfortable they have ever tried and feels like a second skin. We credit this to our unique fabric which is unbelievably soft and silky. We love a splash of colour so you will find vivid prints at the core of every collection. We balance this out by offering softer and more neutral solids as well. Our hope is that our girls have fun, feel confident and enjoy all the vibrant colour combinations of life!! 

As we have grown, so has our passion and what we want to inspire. We want to be more than most fashion labels and we need to make sure how we act and what we say means something. We want to build a movement. And behind every movement you need a message about what you stand for; a motto for how to live and, more importantly, why you do it. 

Our motto is simple: Swim. Sweat. Sparkle.
 
Every girl should dive into life; sweat her tail off so in the end she can sparkle.

Our mission is to create a community that believes long-lasting fashion that doesn't cost a fortune is the only way forward. 

Our goal is simple: for our community to look and feel their best, every single day. 

Our Values

INTEGRITY
•	We do not design, produce or sell anything we wouldn't wear ourselves, or that doesn't meet our exacting quality standards.

PROGRESSION

•	We hire smart, authentic and hardworking people that believe in growing.

RELIABILITY
•	We seek to meet and exceed expectations. 
•	If something goes wrong, we'll put it right. 

SIMPLICITY
•	We believe in the beauty of timeless, classic designs that will fit into every lifestyle.
•	Our clothing is designed for comfort, with every day in mind.

AUTHENTICITY

•	We are true to what we believe.

company_description:
We'll fight your corner! A strategic creative agency for challenger brands that want to outsmart the crowd. Fiercely Integrated. 

Our name comes from boxing. It means left hander or ‘unorthodox'. Southpaws are a rare breed and often turn up as the underdog, so we bring a challenger mindset to your brand from the outset. But, we don't just believe in fighting hard, to truly outperform the competition you need to fight smart. And for that you need: INSIGHT, FORESIGHT and CREATIVE FIREPOWER.

INSIGHT: Our bespoke neuro/behavioural strategy tool creates detailed consumer insights at pace, allowing us to generate a unique emotional ‘Neuromap' of your target audience.

FORESIGHT: We use your audience's ‘Neuromap' to analyse, predict and influence their behaviour, pin-pointing a true consumer centric response that helps you outmanoeuvre rather than outspend the competition.

CREATIVE FIREPOWER: Creativity is our strongest weapon, so we never hold back. Anything we present back to a client must first pass four tests: Is it BOLD enough? Does it DISRUPT the category? Is it CHALLENGING the norm? Does it create a positive EMOTION?

Our parent company is the globally recognised and awarded agency network, Hakuhodo Inc, giving us the ability to operate with global scale.

SERVICES:
BRAND STRATEGY & CREATIVE ADVERTISING: We use our strategic edge to build brand positioning, visual identities and comms strategies that disrupt categories and grow market share. High impact, emotive campaigns that build lasting impressions on audiences across TV, Cinema, OOH, Press, Digital, Radio & VOD. We also extend these ideas to retail and digital touchpoints with brand toolkits and guidelines.

SOCIAL & DIGITAL PRODUCTION: Strategically led and creatively driven, our social media team motivates communities through Channel & Influencer Strategy, Community Management & Reporting. Content Creation: Digital design, front-end development, video & photographic studio production & motion design.

Our mission is clear: to build leading brands and enhance our effectiveness as a multi-brand company across all our core markets. We are committed to enriching homes around the world, not just in the kitchen but extending into living spaces with products that every household needs.

With a presence in over 50 countries through retailers and distributors, DK Household Brands supports its global operations from Shenzhen.

DK Household Brands utilises a diverse range of distribution channels to reach its customers globally. This multi-channel approach ensures that the company can meet the needs of a wide variety of customers, from individual consumers to businesses, across different shopping environments.

DK Household Brands is dedicated to providing innovative and high-quality products, poised for further international expansion and driven by a commitment to sustainability and customer satisfaction.

company_description:
At Zooki, our mission is to make the world a happier and healthier place with great-tasting supplements that actually work. We do this by wrapping nutrients in natural lipids - the same things that make up your cells - to shield, protect and deliver them straight into your system. In delicious and easy-to-take sachets, all of our products contain 100% natural ingredients and are free from sugar, artificial sweeteners, alcohol, gluten, soy and GMOs. Many of our products are also vegan-friendly.

Zooki was born when co-founder Marcus Mollinga sought to find an easy-to-swallow alternative to the unpleasant Omega 3 capsules prescribed to him for a rugby injury. Unable to find anything of the kind, he and university friend Jack Morrison decided to create their own. Zooki is now stocked around the world and has replaced over 70 million capsules with tasty and effective sachets.

We're currently hiring, so if Zooki sounds like the ideal company for you - please reach out!

company_description:
Jungle Creations is an award-winning social publisher, home to The Wild by Jungle, its publisher-powered social agency. Jungle leverages its expertise in communities, creators, and content to help brands build communities and break into culture. 

Jungle owns a portfolio of social-born media brands, including Twisted, Craft Factory, VT and Four Nine, that create and publish original content to over 140 million followers across all major social platforms. These audiences mean Jungle has access to thousands of data points and insights. 

Jungle provides a unique offering to creators and brands via Jungle Creators, Jungle's very own network of global talent which it supports on social monetisation, audience growth and content excellence.

Jungle is also home to The Wild by Jungle, its publisher-powered social agency that offers unrivalled client-direct services and partnerships for global brands. The Wild partners with and creates award-winning work for clients including the likes of Kraft Heinz, PepsiCo, Superdrug, Red Bull and Major League Baseball.

Jungle Creations is truly 'A Space for What's Next', with a track-record for creative ingenuity and storytelling paired with an always-on access to cultural insights through its owned-audiences.

The Original Fit Factory (TOFF) has created an ecosystem of products and services that elevates the wellbeing journey for everyone. Developing the world's foremost environment for wellness, with over 150 employees and 10 million customers in over 77 countries, TOFF strives to achieve its vision of becoming the most loved and successful wellbeing company on earth. TOFF is made up of the following 8 companies who, together, strive to deliver our mission: 

Experiential races including: BubbleRun, TerrainRace, MuddyDash, FoamGlowRun, BlackLightRun – Bringing affordable and exciting family-friendly running events to millions of individuals across America. 

Elf at Work – Designed to integrate physical and mental wellbeing into the workplace, empowering employees and supporting businesses to thrive. 

Niyama Sol – An apparel brand which embodies gratitude, confidence, empowerment, and self-expression through fashionable and sustainable means.

TV.FIT Productions – An original creator and the vision behind over 1,000 hours of world-class work-out and fitness programs.

TruFusion - A boutique fitness studio which offers a diverse range of unheated and heated classes, talented instructors, and industry-leading tech and design elements. From meditation to cardio, to boxing to strength training, barre to cycle, all of TruFusion's classes incorporate the core principles of yoga to create the most exciting, unique, challenging, hardworking, and effective classes available.

Virtual Run - The world's largest selection of Virtual Runs, provides remote running events for everyone, offering a variety of event themes.

company_description:
Hunza G was originally born in 1984, known then only as Hunza under the direction of Peter Meadows who created its signature, unique crinkle-stretch fabrication and high-cut leggy designs.

Hunza became instantly recognisable in the 90s after being worn by Julia Roberts in Pretty Woman – yes, that cut-out mini dress. In 2015, Hunza added the G when Georgiana Huddart relaunched the brand and became creative director after having an obsession with the fabrics throughout her 20s.

With modern nostalgia at its core, Hunza G has grown to become an iconic brand synonymous with the beach. Its 80s roots bring a cool and contemporary twist to beachwear in powerful hues. With a one-size-fit mantra made possible by figure flattering fabric that flexes to sculpt and support all shapes, the secret to Hunza G is to wear it how you want to.

Born in the UK, our signature crinkle is made with no deadstock fabric or wastage. Our one size stance is not only an effort to remain an inclusive brand, but also reduces the risk of over-purchased sizing on a commercial level. Ethical and comfortable, each piece will see you through a lifetime and all that it brings. 

We strive to provide the most considerate and healthy working environment for all members of the team – from production and prep, to Head Office – it's something that really matters to us. Fair trade and a consistently positive setting are key to providing the best end-product for our community of loyal customers.

company_description:
Based in both the UK and the US, we think of ourselves as a modern-day apothecary, born out of a life lived. 
Our products are lovingly made for every stage of life – from childhood to motherhood and menopause to later years, we draw on the rich goodness that nature provides. 

Inspired by principles of sustainability and wellness, our products are researched, developed, and produce by us in house in both our UK and US manufacturing studios, using the finest organic and ethically sourced ingredients. We harness the power of plants, herbs, and essential oils to create clean, effective skincare that treads lightly on the earth. Our commitment to purity means no harmful chemicals and no shortcuts – just the healing power of nature in every jar. 

Like the magic of magnesium to help us rest and the incredible power of mushrooms to heal our bodies, and nourish our skin – nature is our teacher. Our work has inspired our unique culture and lifestyle, deeply rooted in environmental stewardship and a belief in the importance of wellness. We take pride in our partnerships with sustainable suppliers and growers, born out of shared values and ethics. Together we make sure that every step of our process – from farm to face, respects our earth and promotes conscious beauty choices. 

This is our labour of love.

#CleanBeauty #OrganicSkincare #SustainableBeauty #ConsciousLiving

company_description:
We're an arts company dedicated to finding, supporting, and exhibiting the world's most exciting emerging artists. From our collaborative funding platform to creative workshops and unique exhibitions, we bridge the gaps between artists and their audiences to aid a more intimate, inclusive, and proactive art world.

We emerged after working in the traditional art world and quickly realising that we want something different. For a long time, the arts have been built upon dated values and a market driven system. This has, we believe, stunted the emergence of new artists from diverse backgrounds, and inhibited the emergence of experimental work. Because of the way we operate, with IBA all artists are free to create and share their most important, progressive, and personal creations. This means that our audience gets close access to original works that they can't find anywhere else.

At the core of our practice is the belief that art has the potential to create real, powerful change. We advocate for an art practice that actively challenges boundaries; a funding system that is open and transparent; and an art world that exists beyond the white cube.

company_description:
We are a sister led Social Media Agency based in Manchester, UK.

We grew up dreaming of running a business together and pinch ourselves everyday that this is now our reality.

Growing up everyone knew we would end up doing something like this, we've tried blogging, vlogging and anything else you can think of! Learning from first hand experience what works and what doesn't. 

We have been lucky enough to work with a wide range of businesses from all around the world and helped them to reach up to millions of new accounts. As well as get featured in the likes of British Vogue, Forbes, Lad Bible and more!

Our family, friends, past and current clients all say the same thing. 

"You're the best at what you do"

company_description:
Excite your taste buds with Ozerlat Turkish coffee and Turkish delight! 

Ozerlat Real Turkish coffee and Turkish delight is a gourmet experience that takes the coffee ritual and the experience of Turkish delights to new heights. 

Before espressos and cafetières, venti iced double hazelnut non-fat extra foam lattes, there was Turkish coffee - the original gourmet coffee experience.

As Cyprus' oldest coffee roaster, at Ozerlat we've been roasting exceptional Turkish coffee since 1917, when our great-grandfather started selling freshly roasted coffee in his small workshop in Nicosia. Today, our father Dervis Özerlat maintains the traditions and standards set by our great-grandfather. 

From mastering the brew to savouring the complex aromas and flavours, Özerlat Turkish coffee is all about taking a moment out from the clamour of life to lose yourself in an indulgent coffee experience like no other. Still running as a family business, as 4th generation representatives we take up the challenge to revive a tradition that's been overlooked for far too long. To achieve this, we've partnered up with the oldest manufacturer of fine Turkish delights in Istanbul and carefully selected five authentic flavours to present the real taste of this sweet to the UK.
